title: Coronation Insurance Launches ‘Insure and Win 2.0’ …₦35 Million in Prizes Up for Grabs as Customers Secure Their Future
description: Following the remarkable success of last year’s campaign, Coronation Insurance Plc and Coronation Life Assurance Limited have launched the second edition of their highly popular customer reward initia
html:
Following the remarkable success of last year’s campaign, Coronation Insurance Plc and Coronation Life Assurance Limited have launched the second edition of their highly popular customer reward initiative, Insure and Win 2.0.

The campaign offers customers another opportunity to secure their financial future while also giving them a chance to win exciting prizes.

The nationwide promo runs from November 2025 to April 2026 and is open to both new and existing customers. This year’s edition builds on the achievements of the inaugural campaign and promises an even more rewarding experience.

With prizes valued at over ₦35 million, participants can protect what matters most while positioning themselves to win premium rewards. Entry is simple: customers need to purchase any qualifying insurance policy from Coronation Insurance Plc or Coronation Life Assurance Limited. The more policies purchased, the higher the chances of winning. Multiple draws will take place throughout the campaign, beginning in January 2026.

Eligible plans cut across a wide suite of solutions designed to meet diverse protection needs. From Coronation Insurance Plc, customers can choose from Comprehensive or Third-Party Motor Insurance, Householder Insurance, Business Protection Bundle, and Personal Accident Insurance. Coronation Life Assurance Limited offers options including Coronation Rest Easy Lite, Coronation Critical Illness Plan, Coronation Enhance Term, and Coronation Term Life policies.

Last year’s edition delivered life-changing rewards, including a brand-new car, household appliances such as fridges, generators and microwaves, as well as shopping vouchers.

The 2.0 edition promises the same level of excitement, backed by even more attractive incentives and multiple draw cycles running from January 2026.

Mr. Adebowale Adesona, Managing Director/CEO of Coronation Life Assurance Limited, added: “Watching last year’s winners drive away in their new car and go home with prizes that genuinely made a difference was a proud moment for us. Insure and Win 2.0 reflects our ongoing commitment to making insurance more accessible and rewarding. Every one of our products solves a real need, and this campaign gives customers an added reason to choose comprehensive protection.”

Speaking on the launch, Olamide Olajolo, Managing Director/CEO of Coronation Insurance Plc, said: “The overwhelming response to last year’s campaign showed us that Nigerians appreciate being rewarded for making smart financial decisions. Bringing back Insure and Win gives us another opportunity to celebrate our customers. Beyond the prizes, this campaign reinforces the message that securing your assets and future can be exciting, empowering and truly rewarding.”

The Insure and Win 2.0 promo further strengthens Coronation’s role as a trusted prosperity partner delivering innovative solutions for real-life challenges; whether in health, education, travel, or business protection. It showcases how insurance can be both practical and truly rewarding.

The promo runs from November 2025 to April 2026. Customers can enter by purchasing eligible policies from Coronation Insurance Plc or Coronation Life Assurance Limited. Prizes worth over ₦35 million will be awarded, including a brand-new car, an iPhone 16, and a wide range of household appliances. Draws commence in January 2026 and continue throughout the campaign period.
